CustomField.description: Field used for integration between Medical Event objects in UAT and Production Veeva environments
CustomField.formula:
CASE( Type__c, "3rd Party Event Registration",$Label.hippoTrdPartyEventRegistration, "Commercial Advisory Board",$Label.hippoCommercialAdvisoryBoard, "Conference",$Label.hippoConference, "Congress",$Label.hippoCongress, "Master Class", IF(Template_Version__r.Country__r.Name = "France", $Label.hippo_MasterclassWithoutSpace, $Label.hippoMasterClass ), "Meeting",$Label.hippoMeeting, "Roundtable",$Label.hippoRoundtable, "Site Visit",$Label.hippoSiteVisit, "Symposium",$Label.hippoSymposium, "CME (Continuing Medical Education)",$Label.hippoContinuingMedicalEducation, "Local Speaker Programs",$Label.hippoLocalSpeakerPrograms, "Medical Advisory Board", $Label.hippoMedicalAdvisoryBoard, "Medical-2-Medical Educational Event", $Label.hippoMedical2MedicalEducationalEvent,
$Label.hippoOther )
CustomField.label: Event Type Medical Integration
